reason: Active gh login is the allowlisted work account; pre-push must refuse even if git identity is correct.

input: {"env":{"GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL":"stranger@users.noreply.github.com"},"git_var_GIT_AUTHOR_IDENT":"stranger <stranger@users.noreply.github.com> 1700000000 +0000"}
reason: Env-var override sneaks the non-allowlisted account identity past git config; hook must read the effective ident.

reason: Signed-off-by with a raw personal/work-domain email is rejected by scan_trailer_identities. The privacy-alias noreply Co-Authored-By in the same message is allowed; only the raw-domain Signed-off-by is the offender.
